title: Enforce per-repository active ball guard
goal: Make repo-balls or status projection show one active ball per repository, with ambiguity and conflicts visible per repo rather than as one global bottleneck.

acceptance.assertion: A deterministic command or projection lists every known repository with active, none, blocked or ambiguous ball status.
Two active write balls for the same repository are reported as a blocker.
Independent repositories may each have one active ball without being collapsed into a single global active ball.

metadata.advance_reason: BUREAU-DETERMINISTIC-OPS-V1-T002 is verified by this registry state; the next deterministic hardening ball is the per-repository active ball guard.

verified_acceptance.repo-ball-projection: repo-balls already listed every repository and PR #288 preserves that read-only projection while adding ambiguous same-repo state to the per-repository surface.
verified_acceptance.same-repo-conflict: PR #288 reports multiple active runs overlapping one repository as status ambiguous with blocker code multiple-active-balls-for-repository and run/task ids.
verified_acceptance.multi-repo-parallelism: PR #288 test coverage keeps independent repo.alpha and repo.beta active balls distinct; same-repo ambiguity does not collapse all repositories into one global ball.

validation: PR #288 CI validate succeeded for Python 3.10 and 3.12 before merge.
Local validation before PR creation: PYTHONPATH=src make validate -> 392 passed.
